nation: Moravian Of The Thames First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation controls Naahii Inc. (commercial real estate), Naahii Grocery Store Inc. (inactive grocery store), and Lunaapeew Developments LP (gas station and Tim Hortons). OFNLP gaming revenue distributed from Province of Ontario (1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues). Defined contribution pension plan with 5% employer match.
notes: Audit is qualified for three reasons: (1) tangible capital assets acquired prior to 1998 not capitalized; (2) Naahii Inc., Naahii Grocery Store Inc., and Lunaapeew Developments LP are accounted for under modified equity method but do not meet GBE/GBP criteria and should be consolidated — unaudited entities; (3) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not quantified. Income on business enterprises of $1,042,797 and CMHC items included in accumulated surplus change but excluded from base annual surplus line. ISC funding calculated as Fixed + Flexible + Grant lines. Total government transfers include ISC, Health Canada, OFNLP, AIAI, Stepping Stones, Provincial, Ministry of Education, MOHLTC, SFNS, CMHC. No schedule of remuneration provided. Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 so fiscal_year = 2023.
